pages.title: First Priorities
pages.text: 1. Fill your canteen and find a route to purified water.$(br2)2. Activate any Waystone you find and intend to use.$(br2)3. Establish shelter before night.$(br2)4. Search the city carefully; a working radio can turn recovered evidence into supplies.

pages.title: Know the Systems
pages.text: Your condition, thirst, temperature, and infection status all matter. Check them before setting out, and do not wait until a warning becomes a crisis. The field manual records reliable ways to stabilize each one.

pages.title: Entering Buildings
pages.text: A building warning means its containers are locked until the encounter is cleared. Do not let the kill target distract you from the enemies already loaded around you. Boss sites give a separate warning before the Brute arrives.
